---
title: "Golem Grad Tortoise Data"
format: html
theme: cosmo
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
number-depth: 3
embed-resources: true
dpi: 900
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
library(gt)
library(scales)

```

# Getting the data

```{r}
#| label: getting_data
#| warning: false
#| message: false

source("../get_data.R")

clutch_size <- get_data("2026-03-03", "clutch_size_cleaned")
tortoise_body_condition <- get_data("2026-03-03", "tortoise_body_condition_cleaned")

```

# Do recaptures happen more often in spring or summer?

```{r}
#| label: recapture_season_count

tortoise_body_condition |> 
  
  filter_out(year_recode == 1) |> 
  
  count(season) |> 
  
  mutate(proportion = percent(n / sum(n))) |> 
  
  gt() |> 
  
  tab_header(
    title    = "Tortoise Recaptures by Season",
    subtitle = "Excluding first-year captures"
  ) |> 
  
  cols_label(
    season     = "Season",
    n          = "Recaptures",
    proportion = "Proportion"
  ) |> 
  
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_column_labels()
  ) |> 
  
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_fill(color = "#d4edda"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = n == max(n))
  ) |> 
  
  fmt_number(
    columns = n,
    decimals = 0
  )

```

```
